subject: Review F-SFW.4: Cascade precursor conjunction requirement
body:
## Claim Review Request: F-SFW.4
**Paper:** SFW-1 — Fracttalix Sentinel v12.3: A Three-Channel Streaming Anomaly Detector for FRM Regime Identification
**Claim:** Cascade precursor conjunction requirement
**Type:** F

### Statement
The CASCADE_PRECURSOR alert (CRITICAL severity) fires if and only if all three conditions are simultaneously true: (1) COUPLING_DEGRADATION alert active, (2) STRUCTURAL_RHYTHMIC_DECOUPLING alert active, (3) at least cascade_ews_threshold (default 2) EWS indicators elevated. Any single or pair of conditions alone cannot trigger it.

### Falsification Predicate
**FALSIFIED_IF:** cascade_precursor_fires = TRUE AND (coupling_active = FALSE OR decoupling_active = FALSE OR elevated_ews_count < cascade_ews_threshold_val)
**WHERE:** {'cascade_precursor_fires': "binary · ctx.scratch['cascade_precursor_active'] after CascadePrecursorStep.update(ctx) · fracttalix/steps/channels.py line 421", 'coupling_active': "binary · ctx.scratch['coupling_degradation_active'] as read by CascadePrecursorStep line 385", 'decoupling_active': "binary · ctx.scratch['sr_decoupling_active'] as read by CascadePrecursorStep line 386", 'elevated_ews_count': 'integer · count of values in {ews_score, anomaly_score, rfi} that individually exceed config.ews_threshold · CascadePrecursorStep lines 388–395', 'cascade_ews_threshold_val': 'integer · config.cascade_ews_threshold · default 2 · fracttalix/config.py line 202'}
**EVALUATION:** Construct test StepContext instances for all 8 Boolean combinations of (coupling_active, decoupling_active, elevated_ews≥2); verify cascade_precursor_fires = TRUE only when all three conditions satisfied; finite 8-case enumeration
**BOUNDARY:** cascade_precursor_fires = TRUE when any condition is FALSE → FALSIFIED; cascade_precursor_fires = FALSE when all three conditions TRUE (and not in warmup) → also FALSIFIED
**CONTEXT:** Conjunction is an explicit safety design gate: CASCADE_PRECURSOR carries AlertSeverity.CRITICAL and recommends immediate review (see alert message). Single-channel anomaly must not escalate to CRITICAL alone. cascade_ews_threshold=2 means 2 of 3 EWS indicators {ews_score, anomaly_score, rfi} must exceed ews_threshold (default 0.6). All three conditions verified in test_steps_channels.py.

**Derivation chain:** D-SFW.1 → D-SFW.3

### Requested
1. Verify the falsification predicate is logically consistent
2. Check math against known results (Strogatz, Kuznetsov, etc.)
3. Identify counterexamples or edge cases missed
4. Cross-reference against published literature
5. Provide verdict with confidence and reasoning
